summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TOMI mobile login bug fixes (Iteration 3). All 19 backend tests passed. 3 main bugs fixed: 1) Google-only user login now returns 400 (not 500) with helpful message, 2) Account merge on registration works, 3) Auth-callback uses query param for Android deep links.

issues: shadow* style props deprecation warnings (cosmetic, not functional)
Expo Router warning: 'No route named auth-callback exists' - Expected behavior, auth-callback is backend endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 verified: Login endpoint (line 248-253) checks for empty password_hash BEFORE calling verify_password, preventing ValueError from bcrypt
Bug Fix #2 verified: Register endpoint (line 193-208) detects Google-only users and merges account by setting password_hash
Bug Fix #3 verified: Auth-callback (line 448) uses 'tomi://auth-callback?session_id=' query param instead of hash for Android compatibility
Frontend auth-callback.tsx correctly handles both query params (line 24-32) and hash fragments as fallback
Login error handling (line 56) correctly displays API error messages via Alert.alert

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login page loads with all elements functional)

seed_data_creation: Created test user via register endpoint during testing (auto-cleanup recommended)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified all 3 mobile login bug fixes: 1) Google-only users get 400 error with helpful 'use Google Sign-In' message instead of 500 crash, 2) Google-only users can register to merge account (set password), 3) Auth-callback deep link uses ?session_id= query param for Android compatibility. Frontend auth-callback.tsx handles both query params and hash fragments.

bug_1_google_only_login_400.issue: Google-only user login returned 500 (bcrypt crash on empty hash)
bug_1_google_only_login_400.fix: Guard added before verify_password() to check password_hash exists
bug_1_google_only_login_400.message: This account uses Google Sign-In. Please tap 'Continue with Google' to log in.

bug_2_account_merge.issue: Google-only user couldn't set password via register
bug_2_account_merge.fix: Register endpoint detects Google-only users and updates password_hash
bug_2_account_merge.test_result: PASSED - Merged account can login with password

bug_3_deep_link_query_param.issue: Hash fragments (#session_id=) don't work on Android deep links
bug_3_deep_link_query_param.fix: Auth-callback uses ?session_id= query param for tomi:// URL

backend_tests: POST /api/auth/login - merged Google user can login
POST /api/auth/login - never returns 500 for invalid inputs
POST /api/auth/register - new user creates account with token
GET /api/auth-callback - JS handles both hash and query params
frontend_tests: Login page loads with TOMI branding
Sign In form with email/password fields visible
